case_title: GARY JAMES DANIELS VS. PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,700.00 FILED BY DANIELS, GARY JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DANIELS, GARY JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-09-2011, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM AMANDA FISCHER FILED BY DANIELS, GARY JAMES PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DANIELS, GARY JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PACIFIC GAS & ELECTRIC CO. $4,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,760.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
